{{Quote|A planetary shield envelops the planet, projected from the small moon orbiting it. This is our first objective. Anakin will lead a strike force on the Thule Moon to take out the shield generator.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="Game">[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]</ref>}}
'''Sivvi''', also known as the '''Thule Moon''', was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] that was captured by the [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] of [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], becoming the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]].

==History==
Upon becoming trapped in the planet's gravity, Sivvi was often referred to simply as the Thule Moon. Approximately [[4000 BBY/Legends|4,000 years before]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] established a military training facility on the moon, using Sivvi's natural caves and tunnels to practice zero-gravity maneuvers.

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Sivvi housed a [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield generator]] to protect a base established by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] on Thule. This generator was [[Battle of Thule|destroyed]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], piloting an [[All Terrain Experimental Transport]], during the final stages of the [[Dark Reaper crisis]], leading to a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] assault on Thule itself.

{{Moon-stub}}
